summary: Collector Bingo compact preview + modal refactor testing COMPLETE. All 10 features verified working. Compact preview widget (max-width 500px, centered) displays read-only 5x5 mini grid with 'view full card' button. Modal opens with interactive 5x5 grid, export button, lock status, and closes properly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue, not blocking

passed_tests: Compact preview card visible on Explore page with data-testid='bingo-preview'
Preview card has max-width: 500px (verified via computed styles)
Preview card is centered (parent has justify-content: center)
Preview shows read-only 5x5 mini grid with <div> elements (non-interactive)
Preview shows 'view full card' button when card is locked
Clicking 'view full card' opens full-screen modal with data-testid='bingo-modal'
Modal shows interactive 5x5 bingo grid with <button> elements
Modal has 25 interactive squares with data-testid='bingo-sq-{0-24}'
Modal squares are disabled when card is locked
Modal has 'save & share card' export button with data-testid='bingo-export-btn'
Modal closes when X button is clicked
Free space (sweet spot) at center (index 12) in both preview and modal grids
Date range 'Feb 27 — Mar 2' displayed in both preview and modal
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent has console warning about missing aria-describedby - consider adding aria-describedby='bingo-modal-desc' to DialogContent (already has id='bingo-modal-desc' on the description paragraph)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Collector Bingo refactored from large widget to compact preview + modal pattern. Key data-testid values: bingo-preview, bingo-grid-preview, bingo-sq-preview-{0-24} for preview; bingo-modal, bingo-grid, bingo-sq-{0-24}, bingo-export-btn for modal. Card is currently locked (Feb 27 - Mar 2 expired) so button shows 'view full card' and modal squares are disabled. Community stats (0 players during test period). No bingo badge displayed as user hasn't achieved bingo. All interaction happens in modal only - preview is read-only.
